overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The player walks along a wet commercial promenade lined with neon shops and palm trees, then ascends a grand staircase to an elevated industrial walkway leading toward a glowing exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial promenade with neon storefronts

events.description: pedestrian in orange jacket passes close by on the right side
slight turn toward the staircase area while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked commercial street, passing neon-lit shops and palm trees

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket walks past the camera from right to left
person in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: corner shop with bright neon signage and green accents
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
tall palm trees lining the center of the promenade
futuristic cars and trucks driving along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked futuristic commercial street lined with palm trees and neon-lit shops. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon signs while vehicles pass by on the right and pedestrians occasionally walk past.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial staircase connecting street to elevated walkway

events.description: transition from open commercial street to enclosed concrete stairwell
continuing steady ascent up the long concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs with green railings, following another pedestrian upward

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and red cap ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with green painted railings on both sides
green metal handrails lining the staircase
tall industrial facade with metal scaffolding and windows

segments.scene_description: Leaving the street level behind, the camera ascends a long concrete staircase with green railings. The environment shifts from commercial to industrial as we climb between tall buildings, following another pedestrian toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial elevated walkway with ventilation pipes

events.description: exiting stairwell onto elevated industrial walkway with mesh fencing
approaching bright glowing exit door, illumination increases significantly

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial elevated walkway toward a glowing exit, passing through a corridor with metal mesh walls

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt continuing to walk ahead toward the glowing exit

entered.detail: concrete walkway with green painted walls transitioning to industrial mesh
chain-link metal mesh fencing on both sides of the walkway
large cylindrical ventilation pipes running overhead
tall vertical door emitting bright white light with vertical neon strips

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow industrial elevated walkway enclosed by metal mesh fencing and large overhead pipes. The corridor leads toward a brightly glowing exit door that illuminates the end of the passage, with scattered debris on the wet floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, rain-soaked commercial promenade into a stark, elevated industrial corridor. It begins by gliding along a futuristic street where neon-lit shops and palm trees reflect off the wet pavement as vehicles and pedestrians pass by. As the camera leaves the street level, the scene shifts toward a more utilitarian atmosphere while ascending a long concrete staircase with green railings between towering buildings. The movement then transitions into a narrow elevated walkway enclosed by metal mesh fencing and overhead pipes, moving past scattered debris on the damp floor. Finally, the corridor opens up as the camera advances toward a brightly glowing exit door that illuminates the end of the passage.
